title: A trivial prompt runs to a clean agent_stopped(converged) with no error
description: Given a prompt the model can answer in one turn with no tools, the run reaches a terminal agent_stopped event whose avp.reason is converged, and never emits error_occurred. Structural and model-agnostic: the assertion is the stop reason and the absence of errors, not any token/cost numbers (which vary run to run).

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.

forbidden_events.label: no error on a trivial prompt
